name: Rice with Spinach Herbs & Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cook rice in salted water until tender but still undercooked (15 minutes for white rice, 30 minutes for brown). Drain, rinse with cold water, and drain again; set aside.
3. Wash spinach and remove stems. Cook spinach in the remaining water from cooking the rice until wilted. Cool and chop coarsely.
4. Heat olive oil in a skillet. Add onion and sauté until softened.
5. Add garlic and thyme to the skillet. Stir in the cooked rice, chopped spinach, parsley, red pepper flakes, and grated provolone cheese (if using). Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Transfer the mixture to a lightly oiled baking dish. Drizzle additional oil on top, if desired.
7. Cover with foil and bake for 25 minutes.
8. Remove foil and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until heated through.
